title: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer set to outline exit plan as pressure to quit builds
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces mounting pressure from within his party and is expected to announce a departure timetable soon. This political crisis could reshape British governance and party dynamics.
content: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer is expected to set out a timetable for his departure later.

zh.title: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默预计将公布辞职计划，辞职压力不断增加
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默面临来自党内的持续压力，预计将很快宣布离职时间表。这场政治危机可能会重塑英国的治理方式和政党动态。

title: Why a 66-year-old water treaty is becoming the latest India-Pakistan flashpoint
summary: India and Pakistan are escalating tensions over the 66-year-old Indus Water Treaty after India suspended the agreement, threatening a critical water-sharing arrangement between the nuclear-armed neighbors. The dispute could destabilize the region and impact water security for hundreds of millions of people.
content: India and Pakistan are locked in a dispute over the Indus Water Treaty after New Delhi suspended the pact, raising concerns about regional stability.

zh.title: 66年历史的水利条约为何成为印巴最新的冲突焦点
zh.summary: 印度和巴基斯坦在66年历史的印度河水利条约问题上升级紧张关系，印度暂停该协议后，威胁到这两个核武装邻国之间的关键水资源共享安排。这一争端可能会使该地区局势不稳定，并影响数亿人的水资源安全。

title: EasyJet rejects £4.7bn takeover offer from US investment firm
summary: Budget airline EasyJet has rejected a £4.7 billion takeover proposal from US investment firm Castlelake, calling the bid opportunistic. The rejection indicates the airline believes it can create more value independently.
content: The airline describes the latest bid approach from Castlelake as "highly opportunistic".

zh.title: 易捷航空拒绝美国投资公司47亿英镑的收购要约
zh.summary: 廉价航空公司易捷航空已拒绝了美国投资公司Castlelake提出的47亿英镑收购提案，称该出价是机会主义的。拒绝表明该航空公司认为它可以独立创造更多价值。

title: U.S., Iran agree on roadmap for final deal and plan to end military operations in Lebanon
summary: The United States and Iran have agreed on a roadmap toward a final nuclear deal and plan to cease military operations in Lebanon as part of historic talks. The negotiations extend a fragile ceasefire by 60 days and represent a significant diplomatic breakthrough.
content: The talks were the first round of negotiations under a memorandum of understanding signed last week, which extended a tenuous ceasefire by 60 days.

zh.title: 美国和伊朗就最终协议路线图达成一致，并计划结束黎巴嫩军事行动
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗在历史性谈判中就通往最终核协议的路线图达成一致，并计划停止在黎巴嫩的军事行动。这些谈判延长了脆弱的停火协议60天，代表了一项重大的外交突破。

title: Colombian right-wing candidate De La Espriella wins tight presidential race
summary: Colombia's right-wing candidate Abelardo De La Espriella, backed by Donald Trump, has narrowly won the presidential election. His victory signals a shift in Colombian politics away from leftist policies toward a more conservative direction.
content: Colombian right-wing candidate Abelardo De La Espriella, who is backed by Donald Trump, appears to have clinched a narrow victory in the presidential election.

zh.title: 哥伦比亚右翼候选人德拉埃斯普里亚在激烈的总统竞选中获胜
zh.summary: 得到唐纳德·特朗普支持的哥伦比亚右翼候选人阿贝拉多·德拉埃斯普里亚在总统选举中险胜。他的胜利标志着哥伦比亚政治从左翼政策向更保守方向的转变。

title: CNBC Daily Open: U.K.'s Keir Starmer on the verge of quitting
summary: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces imminent resignation as internal party tensions escalate into a political crisis. His departure would mark a significant shift in British political leadership and governance.
content: A war of words in Westminster could cost U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer his job, as the leader looks set to resign amid pressure from within his party.

zh.title: CNBC每日开市：英国的基尔·斯塔默即将辞职
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默面临迫在眉睫的辞职，因为党内紧张局势升级为政治危机。他的离职将标志着英国政治领导和治理的重大转变。

title: 54 injured and 18 missing after explosion at Qatar LNG site, authorities say
summary: An explosion at Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG facility has injured 54 people and left 18 missing, impacting one of the world's critical energy infrastructure sites. The incident raises concerns about global LNG supply and industrial safety.
content: 54 people have been injured while 18 are missing after an explosion at Qatar's core LNG processing site of Ras Laffan on Sunday, authorities said.

zh.title: 卡塔尔液化天然气工厂爆炸造成54人受伤18人失踪
zh.summary: 卡塔尔拉斯拉凡液化天然气设施发生爆炸，造成54人受伤，18人失踪，影响了全球关键能源基础设施。此次事故引发了对全球液化天然气供应和工业安全的担忧。

title: China imposes trade curbs on dozens of U.S. firms in retaliation for Pentagon blacklist
summary: China has imposed trade restrictions on dozens of US companies in retaliation for the Pentagon adding Chinese technology firms to its military blacklist. The tit-for-tat escalation heightens US-China tech tensions and trade friction.
content: The Pentagon earlier this month updated its so-called 1260H list by adding a slew of Chinese technology companies to a roster of entities it believes have aided Beijing's military.

zh.title: 中国对数十家美国公司实施贸易限制以报复五角大楼黑名单
zh.summary: 中国对数十家美国公司实施贸易限制，以报复五角大楼将中国科技公司列入军事黑名单。这种相互报复的升级加剧了美中科技紧张关系和贸易摩擦。

title: Toy Story 5 scores record opening weekend for franchise
summary: Toy Story 5 has achieved a record opening weekend for the franchise, signaling a recovery for Disney and Pixar following their recent box office struggles. The film's success demonstrates continued audience appeal for the beloved animated series.
content: The film's opening is a return to form for Disney and Pixar after facing notable challenges in recent years.

zh.title: 《玩具总动员5》创造系列电影开创周末票房纪录
zh.summary: 《玩具总动员5》创造了系列电影开创周末的票房纪录，标志着迪士尼和皮克斯在近期票房困难后的复苏。这部电影的成功证明了观众对这部深受喜爱的动画系列的持续热情。

title: Oil rises after Trump threatens fresh strikes on Iran, overshadowing peace talks
summary: Oil prices rose Monday following President Trump's threats of military action against Iran, which could escalate regional tensions and disrupt global energy supplies. This development overshadows ongoing peace negotiations and underscores geopolitical risks affecting commodity markets.
content: Oil prices climbed on Monday after U.S. President Donald Trump threatened renewed military action against Iran.

zh.title: 特朗普威胁对伊朗新一轮打击后油价上升，黯淡和平谈判前景
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普威胁对伊朗采取军事行动后，油价于周一上升，这可能会加剧地区紧张局势并扰乱全球能源供应。这一发展黯淡了正在进行的和平谈判，并凸显了影响大宗商品市场的地缘政治风险。
